assertions.reason: The targeted widget tests for populated, empty, and retryable error states all passed, confirming the thread list shows recent threads when available and otherwise surfaces explicit loading/empty/error user states with retry recovery.

The populated-row widget test passed while asserting visible Running and Completed labels plus repository/branch and workspace text, demonstrating that each row exposes status and repo/workspace context.
The targeted search widget test passed, showing that filtering by runtime-tools reduced the list to the matching thread and clearing the search restored the full unfiltered list.

frictions: The flutter-mobile-widget-tests harness provides assertion-backed command logs rather than standalone screenshots or console captures, so this report relies on the passing user-surface widget expectations recorded in the saved Flutter test logs.
